name: claude-toolbox
description: Official Claude Code toolbox from Kanopi Studios for Content Management System (CMS) development

plugins.name: cms-cultivator
plugins.description: Agent Skills and specialist agents for Drupal and WordPress. PR workflows, accessibility / performance / security / quality audits, design-to-code, FRD generation with story points, CSV export, strategist UX audits, PM workflows, Drupal.org contribution, and Drupal/Pantheon DevOps.

plugins.name: claude-dev-insights
plugins.description: Comprehensive developer analytics and productivity insights for Claude Code. Automatically tracks session analytics, enforces security policies, guards against cost overruns, and ensures code quality with 4 intelligent hooks: SessionEnd, SessionStart, PreToolUse, and PostToolUse.

plugins.name: cc-teamwork-token-count
plugins.description: SessionStart hook that logs every Claude Code session to a JSONL file with git branch and parsed Teamwork task ID. Adds a /tw-token-count slash command that aggregates ccusage token spend per Teamwork task, with optional Teamwork MCP enrichment for task and project names.
